title: AI Engineer
company_focus: Water, hygiene and infection prevention solutions
description:
Job Characteristics: Independently design, implement, and
deploy intelligent systems powered by large language models
(LLMs), agent orchestration frameworks, and embedding-based
retrieval solutions. This role blends hands-on engineering
with solution thinking — focusing on scalable workflows,
cloud-native delivery, and real-world GenAI application
integration.

Education/Work Experience: Degree and 2-4 years experience.

Independence Level/Reports to: Normally reports to AI
Engineering Manager.
responsibilities: Design, implement, and deploy intelligent systems powered by large language models (LLMs)
Build agent orchestration frameworks for autonomous AI workflows
Develop embedding-based retrieval solutions and RAG systems
Create scalable cloud-native GenAI application architectures
Integrate real-world GenAI applications into production environments
Implement end-to-end AI solutions from prototype to production deployment
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building and deploying LLM-
powered systems, agent orchestration frameworks, and
retrieval solutions. The position is hands-on with GenAI
technologies including designing and implementing
intelligent systems, which is core AI-first work.
